component.name: AudioPlayer
component.script:
sub init() m.audioPlayer = m.top.findNode("audioPlayer") m.playlistTitle = m.top.findNode("playlistTitle") m.songTitle = m.top.findNode("songTitle") m.songNumber = m.top.findNode("songNumber") m.statusLabel = m.top.findNode("statusLabel") m.audioPlayer.observeField("state", "onAudioStateChange") m.top.observeField("focusedChild", "onFocusChanged") m.songs = [] m.currentIndex = 0 m.isPlaying = false end sub
sub onFocusChanged() if m.top.hasFocus() print ">>> AudioPlayer got focus" end if end sub
sub loadAndPlay() m.playlistTitle.text = "Playlist: " + m.top.playlistName m.statusLabel.text = "Loading songs..."
m.task = CreateObject("roSGNode", "NetworkTask") m.task.apiBaseUrl = m.top.apiBaseUrl m.task.authToken = m.top.authToken m.task.requestType = "songs" m.task.playlistId = m.top.playlistId m.task.observeField("response", "onSongsLoaded") m.task.control = "run" end sub
sub onSongsLoaded() result = m.task.response
if result.success and result.data <> invalid and result.data.playlist <> invalid and result.data.playlist.songs <> invalid m.songs = result.data.playlist.songs if m.songs.count() > 0 m.currentIndex = 0 playSong(m.currentIndex) else m.statusLabel.text = "No songs in playlist" end if else m.statusLabel.text = "Error loading songs" end if end sub
sub playSong(index as integer) if index < 0 or index >= m.songs.count() then return
song = m.songs[index] m.currentIndex = index
title = "Unknown" if song.specific_title <> invalid then title = song.specific_title m.songTitle.text = title m.songNumber.text = "Song " + (index + 1).tostr() + " of " + m.songs.count().tostr() m.statusLabel.text = "Loading audio..."
audioUrl = "" baseUrl = "https://music.aiacopilot.com"
' PREFER archived_url (server) - CDN URLs expire/fail if song.archived_url <> invalid and song.archived_url <> "" if Left(song.archived_url, 1) = "/" then audioUrl = baseUrl + song.archived_url else audioUrl = song.archived_url end if
' Fallback to download_url only if no archived if audioUrl = "" and song.download_url <> invalid and song.download_url <> "" then audioUrl = song.download_url
print ">>> Playing song: " + title print ">>> Audio URL: " + audioUrl
if audioUrl <> "" content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") content.url = audioUrl content.streamFormat = "mp3" m.audioPlayer.content = content m.audioPlayer.control = "play" m.isPlaying = true m.statusLabel.text = "Playing..." else print ">>> NO AUDIO URL FOUND" m.statusLabel.text = "No audio URL - skipping" nextSong() end if end sub
sub onAudioStateChange() state = m.audioPlayer.state print ">>> Audio state: " + state if state = "playing" then m.statusLabel.text = "Playing" : m.isPlaying = true if state = "paused" then m.statusLabel.text = "Paused" : m.isPlaying = false if state = "stopped" then m.statusLabel.text = "Stopped" : m.isPlaying = false if state = "finished" then nextSong() if state = "error" print ">>> PLAYBACK ERROR" m.statusLabel.text = "Playback error - skipping" nextSong() end if end sub
sub togglePlayPause() if m.isPlaying then m.audioPlayer.control = "pause" else m.audioPlayer.control = "resume" end sub
sub nextSong() if m.currentIndex < m.songs.count() - 1 then playSong(m.currentIndex + 1) else m.statusLabel.text = "End of playlist" end sub
sub previousSong() if m.currentIndex > 0 then playSong(m.currentIndex - 1) else playSong(0) end sub
sub stopPlayback() m.audioPlayer.control = "stop" m.isPlaying = false end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as string, press as boolean) as boolean print ">>> Key pressed: " + key + " press=" + press.tostr() if not press then return false if key = "OK" print ">>> Toggle play/pause" togglePlayPause() return true else if key = "right" print ">>> Next song" nextSong() return true else if key = "left" print ">>> Previous song" previousSong() return true else if key = "back" print ">>> Back pressed" m.top.backPressed = true return true end if return false end function
